series_metadata.series_description: Consists of all documentation associated with an administrative hearing record including, but not limited to: Warning letter, Notice of Opportunity for Hearing, Request for Hearing, Notice of Hearing, Report and Recommendation, Settlement Agreement, Final Adjudication Order, Appeal, and any and all correspondence related to the case.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Current, five (5) years from date case was closed. ; Electronic: Current, five (5) years from date case was closed
